name: dazuiba/handoff
summary: Cross-agent task dispatcher: send work to DeepSeek V4 or other agents from inside a Codex session, without losing context. Runs in background via `handoff run`; result returns to the caller automatically.
evidence: Ships `handoff-ds.toml`, a Codex subagent definition, so Codex users can say 'have handoff-ds execute the task' and dispatch work directly.
Runs the delegated task in the background via `handoff run`; the caller receives a `RESULT=<path>` handle and is notified on completion without blocking.
